title: Vanitech
description: This modpack includes mods for a technical player and for optimization
body:
This modpack has a lot of mods that a technical player could use, like masa's mods, or more niché plugins or building, with the item randomzier, great for building walls with texture

Attributions:
* Xaero's Minimap: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xaeros-minimap
